latest_videos.video_title: My first solo concert in May 14 is coming #likenastya
latest_videos.video_description:
Hi, I'm Nastya, and I'm so excited to see you at my first solo concert in USA! It will be an unforgettable, the best children's show in the world, where I will sing for you with my friends and favorite characters. There will be gifts and surprises, as well as a chance to meet me in person and take unforgettable photos. See you on May 14th in Fort Lauderdale!
Tickets can be purchased here: https://www.ticketmaster.com/like-nastya-ft-lauderdale-florida-05-14-2026/event/0D006428A2BC5065
